subcodes.first_line: O thou who art associated with grace! This illustrious name signifieth the manifestation of divine bounty, and from its essential requirements [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنتسب الی الفضل این نام نامی معنیش مظهریت فضل الهیست و از لوازمش
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
